focus: design-systems -> foundations/motion craft vs governance split

summary: The design-token and theming-system skills add a useful primitive -> semantic -> component-scoped token layer distinction not stated compactly in shared sk-design vocabulary.
minimalEdit: Add a Token Layers note defining primitive values, semantic role aliases, and component-scoped tokens only for repeated component jobs not expressible by semantic roles.

summary: Component-spec adds a compact anatomy/variant/state/behavior/accessibility checklist that foundations handoff does not explicitly require today.
minimalEdit: Add one handoff sentence requiring component-level design handoffs to name anatomy, variants, states, behavior, accessibility requirements, and usage constraints.

summary: The theming-system skill adds a practical check for themeable versus fixed tokens and high-contrast/dimmed modes, while existing palette guidance already covers primitive/semantic layers and dark surfaces.
minimalEdit: Extend Token Layers with component-scoped tokens and add a verification bullet for themeable vs fixed tokens plus high-contrast/dimmed modes when in scope.

summary: Icon-system provides build-facing icon craft beyond current optical-centering notes: grid, sizes, style family, accessible labels/decorative hiding, text pairing, contrast, and touch targets.
minimalEdit: Add one Optical Adjustments bullet covering icon family/grid/stroke consistency, named sizes, accessible names or aria-hidden behavior, critical icon text pairing, and 44x44 touch targets.

summary: Motion-system mostly overlaps existing motion strategy, but adds a reusable token-system framing for durations, easing, choreography caps, and global reduced-motion overrides.
minimalEdit: Add a motion-token note mapping existing timing/easing bands to token roles when a reusable system is needed, with reduced-motion duration overrides preserving state feedback.

summary: Naming-convention adds a small useful naming shape and pitfall list; current shared vocabulary only states purpose-before-appearance quality checks.
minimalEdit: Add a naming rule near Token Quality Checks: prefer {category}-{property}-{concept}-{variant}-{state}, avoid author-only abbreviations, and use purpose/direction-neutral terms over visual or physical-direction names.

summary: Accessibility-audit is already covered by design-audit and accessibility_performance: WCAG/accessibility routing, priority order, measurable contrast/touch thresholds, issue reporting, and P0-P3 severity are stronger in the target.
Localization-design should not become a standalone sk-design import: practical checks for text expansion, RTL, locale formats, CJK, and emoji already live in typography and audit hardening.
Design-system governance is ownership, contribution, versioning, breaking-change, deprecation, communication, and adoption-metric lifecycle work; do not import it into sk-design.
Documentation-template and pattern-library are documentation/library maintenance surfaces; their only build-facing residue is already captured by the component-spec checklist.
